en.name: Pac-Man
en.desc: Eat all dots while avoiding colorful ghosts
en.description: Pac-Man is the most iconic video game character in history! Navigate through a maze filled with dots while being chased by four colorful ghosts—Blinky, Pinky, Inky, and Clyde. Eat all the dots to advance to the next level, but be careful: one touch from a ghost costs a life! Power pellets turn the tables, allowing you to eat the ghosts for bonus points. This 1980 classic defined the maze chase genre and remains as addictive today as ever.
en.objectives: Clear each maze by eating all the dots while avoiding or hunting ghosts. Maximize your score by eating ghosts during power-up mode and collecting bonus fruits. Survive as many levels as possible as the ghosts become faster and more aggressive.
en.howToPlay: Use arrow keys to guide Pac-Man through the maze. Eat all dots to win. Avoid ghosts unless powered up. Power pellets make ghosts vulnerable temporarily.

rules.controls: Use arrow keys (↑ ↓ ← →) or WASD to navigate Pac-Man through the maze. Pac-Man continuously moves in the chosen direction until you change direction or hit a wall.
mechanics: Eat all 240 dots in the maze to complete a level
Four ghosts have unique AI behaviors and chase patterns
Power pellets make ghosts vulnerable for a limited time
Eating ghosts in succession increases bonus points (200, 400, 800, 1600)
Bonus fruits appear periodically for extra points
features: Power Pellets - Turn ghosts blue and edible
Ghost Behaviors - Each ghost has unique movement patterns
Bonus Items - Fruits appear for extra points
Speed Increase - Ghosts get faster each level

tips: Learn each ghost's unique behavior pattern for better evasion
Save power pellets for emergencies or maximum point opportunities
Clear one side of the maze at a time
Use tunnels to escape ghosts - you move faster through them

faq.question: What do the different ghosts do?
faq.answer: Blinky (red) chases directly, Pinky (pink) ambushes from ahead, Inky (cyan) uses complex targeting, and Clyde (orange) has random behavior when close.

faq.question: How long do power pellets last?
faq.answer: Power pellets make ghosts vulnerable for a limited time that decreases as you advance levels. Eat ghosts quickly before they turn back!

faq.question: What's the maximum score from eating ghosts?
faq.answer: Eating all four ghosts after one power pellet scores 200+400+800+1600=3000 points. The sequence resets with each power pellet.

faq.question: Why use the tunnels?
faq.answer: Pac-Man maintains normal speed through tunnels while ghosts slow down, making them perfect escape routes when cornered.

zh.name: 吃豆人
zh.desc: 吃掉所有豆子同时躲避彩色幽灵
zh.description: 吃豆人是历史上最具标志性的电子游戏角色！在被四个彩色幽灵——红鬼、粉鬼、青鬼和橙鬼——追逐的同时穿越充满豆子的迷宫。吃掉所有豆子进入下一关，但要小心：碰到幽灵会失去一条命！能量豆让你扭转局势，可以吃掉幽灵获得额外分数。这款1980年的经典定义了迷宫追逐游戏类型，至今仍然令人上瘾。
zh.objectives: 通过吃掉所有豆子清除每个迷宫，同时躲避或猎杀幽灵。在能量模式下吃幽灵和收集奖励水果来最大化分数。随着幽灵变得更快更具攻击性，尽可能生存更多关卡。
zh.howToPlay: 使用方向键移动吃豆人。吃掉豆子得分。避开幽灵——被碰到会失去一条命。吃掉能量球可以暂时反击幽灵。

rules.controls: 使用方向键（↑ ↓ ← →）或WASD导航吃豆人穿越迷宫。吃豆人会持续朝选定方向移动，直到你改变方向或撞墙。
mechanics: 吃掉迷宫中所有240个豆子完成一关
四个幽灵有独特的AI行为和追逐模式
能量豆使幽灵在限定时间内变得脆弱
连续吃幽灵会增加奖励分数（200、400、800、1600）
奖励水果定期出现提供额外分数
features: 能量豆 - 让幽灵变蓝可被吃
幽灵行为 - 每个幽灵有独特的移动模式
奖励物品 - 水果出现获得额外分数
速度增加 - 每关幽灵都会变快

tips: 学习每个幽灵的独特行为模式以更好地躲避
保存能量豆用于紧急情况或最大得分机会
利用隧道逃脱幽灵——你在其中移动更快

faq.question: 不同的幽灵有什么区别？
faq.answer: 红鬼直接追逐，粉鬼从前方伏击，青鬼使用复杂定位，橙鬼靠近时行为随机。

faq.question: 能量豆效果持续多久？
faq.answer: 能量豆让幽灵变得脆弱的时间随关卡提升而减少。在它们变回来之前快速吃掉！

faq.question: 吃幽灵的最高分是多少？
faq.answer: 一个能量豆后吃掉所有四个幽灵得200+400+800+1600=3000分。每个能量豆重置序列。

faq.question: 为什么要使用隧道？
faq.answer: 吃豆人在隧道中保持正常速度而幽灵会减速，是被困时完美的逃脱路线。
